analysis_commentary: Stable healthy run. 10-min checkpoint clean: legal_mass=0.547, max=0.12 (well within GOAL-1A/1B). last_probe legal_mass=0.474 vs baseline 0.597, max_prob=0.22 vs 0.14 — within variance. pEnt 6.71-6.78. Only 1 arena despite 240s interval (presumably timing alignment with first probe trigger). No promotion. arena_auto_interval is purely cadence — variance dominates. Neutral.
